description: Hardened session logout and frontend auth-state reset behavior.
highlights: Auth and profile endpoints now return no-store cache headers so browsers do not reuse stale session responses or the wrong recent user.
Logout and account deletion now clear the Flask session and explicitly remove the session cookie before the app returns to the login screen.
Frontend auth reset is now centralized so in-memory user state, chat/task caches, badges, forms, and user-scoped local storage are cleared consistently.

description: Added PostgreSQL support for persistent Render deployments.
highlights: The app now uses DATABASE_URL when it is set, so Render can keep users, tasks, chats, activity, tokens, and archive history in PostgreSQL instead of a redeployed SQLite file.
Kept local development compatibility by falling back to the existing SQLite database when DATABASE_URL is not configured.
Added a compatibility layer so the current routes, root/admin logic, and real-time Socket.IO flows keep working without a route-by-route rewrite.

description: Cleaned up obsolete startup and debug leftovers after a full program checkup.
highlights: Disabled the old boot-token root auto-login path so legacy launcher links now fall back to the regular login page.
Removed unused startup-token helper code while keeping normal authentication, sessions, password reset, and admin behavior intact.
Quieted Konami key-by-key console logging unless local debug mode is explicitly enabled.

description: Fixed safe shutdown for the Windows stop launcher.
highlights: The stop launcher now finds and stops the actual Task Manager Python server process instead of only the starter console.
The server now runs without Flask's debug reloader so one-click start and stop process tracking stays reliable.
Shutdown still leaves saved tasks, users, messages, uploads, and database files untouched.

description: Encoding Fix
highlights: Fixed mojibake issues across UI glyphs and verified translation text remains valid UTF-8.
Ensured UTF-8 encoding for the main template, split JavaScript translation files, CSS, and update-log data.
Corrected translation/static rendering checks so Russian, special characters, and UI labels display cleanly.

description: Simplified local startup so launchers open the normal login page.
highlights: Removed the launcher dependency on special boot-token root-login links during normal startup.
The local launcher now starts on localhost, while the LAN launcher starts the app for same-network access and shows the connection address.
Updated the quick-start guide so users log in through the regular authentication page and get clearer startup help.

description: Improved startup token login fallback behavior.
highlights: Kept secure boot-token validation for automatic root login when the launcher starts a fresh server.
Existing-server launches now open the normal homepage instead of trying a token that may belong to a previous server process.
Failed boot-login attempts now fall back to the regular login page instead of showing a confusing invalid-token JSON message.

description: Improved text-to-speech language and voice selection.
highlights: TTS now follows the currently selected app language with locale mappings for English, Russian, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, German, Ukrainian, and Polish.
Pirate, LOLCAT, and Minecraft style use a graceful English fallback voice when no themed browser voice is available.
Settings now shows the active TTS voice while keeping Alt + R and read-aloud buttons working.

description: Fixed translation encoding after the frontend language data split.
highlights: Restored Cyrillic, Scandinavian, German, Polish, Ukrainian, and emoji language metadata from mojibake back to valid UTF-8.
Kept the existing split translation loader and language switching behavior intact.
Verified the main template declares UTF-8 and the translation source is saved as UTF-8.

description: Added a one-click safe stop file for shutting down the local Task Manager server.
highlights: The launcher now records the started server PID so the correct Task Manager process can be stopped later.
Added a clickable Stop Task Manager file that shuts down the recorded local server without editing saved tasks or database contents.
Improved the local Windows workflow so starting and stopping the app is simpler for non-technical classroom use.

description: Fixed the Windows startup flow so the app waits for the server, opens reliably, and logs into the root account automatically on boot.
highlights: The launcher now starts the Flask server first, waits until it responds, and only then opens the browser.
Added a one-time startup root-login route secured by a boot token so the opened browser lands inside the app instead of on a blank page.
Kept the normal login system unchanged while making the local startup flow much more reliable for classroom use.

description: Started a safe modular refactor to reduce file size and keep the project easier to maintain.
highlights: Split the main template into reusable partials while preserving the existing page structure and element hooks.
Moved shared database/bootstrap helpers and update-log data out of the main Flask file into backend modules and data files.
Split the frontend runtime into smaller script files and stabilized the active asset loading path so the app still boots cleanly.

description: Added reusable task templates for faster task creation.
highlights: Users can now save personal task templates with reusable subtasks and optional default settings.
The task creator can start from scratch or apply a template to preload subtasks and defaults.
Templates stay separate from real tasks so teams can reuse them without cluttering the main task list.

description: Added one-click Windows launchers for easier local startup.
highlights: Added a simple double-click launcher that opens the project in the right folder and starts the app.
Added dependency checks with optional virtual-environment activation when a venv is present.
Added a second launcher and quick-start guide for local network use without changing app behavior.

description: Added a visible private messages workspace with direct-message shortcuts from user profiles.
highlights: Added a dedicated private messages page with existing chats, a new-chat action, and live replies.
Added profile-page Message buttons that reopen an existing direct chat or create one when needed.
Kept self-messaging blocked while preserving real-time delivery and custom chat styling.

description: Added a dedicated completed tasks view with user-based search.
highlights: Added a completed tasks page that shows archived titles, contributors, completers, and timestamps.
Added user search so teams can quickly view work someone completed or helped finish.
Kept completion history tied to the confirmed-completion flow instead of unfinished 100 percent tasks.

description: Added task material allocations, material-based subtask requirements, and materials usage analytics.
highlights: Tasks can now reserve total material pools that subtasks must stay within.
Subtasks can use a materials-needed requirement with safe backend validation for remaining stock.
Added materials usage analytics over time so admins can track which resources were consumed.

description: Added subtask requirements with file submission support.
highlights: Subtasks can now require a file submission before they can be marked complete.
Added safe backend storage for requirement submissions with room for more requirement types later.
Added visible requirement status so teams can see which subtasks are blocked or satisfied.

description: Added multi-file task attachments with safe metadata storage.
highlights: Tasks can now store multiple attached files of any type with safe upload metadata.
Added create and edit support for attachments without breaking existing task flows.
Added in-task download links so attachments stay easy to access from task details.

description: Added global task visibility with backend-enforced edit modes.
highlights: Tasks can now be shared globally so every user can see them.
Global tasks now support either everyone-edit mode or assigned-users-and-admins edit mode.
Kept assignment logic intact while enforcing global task permissions in backend task and subtask routes.

description: Added task image support with main images and banners.
highlights: Added safe task image storage for main card images and optional banner art.
Added create and edit support for task images without changing core task flows.
Improved task cards so images display cleanly without cluttering compact mode.

description: Fixed user profile completion charts so completed history renders reliably.
highlights: Aligned user profile chart buckets with stored completion timestamps across all time filters.
Improved completed-history chart rendering for single completed tasks and sparse datasets.
Kept admin analytics behavior and admin-only access rules unchanged.

description: Added task completion confirmation before archiving completed work.
highlights: Tasks now wait for explicit completion confirmation instead of being counted immediately at 100 percent.
Confirmed tasks move into completed history and live completion stats only after approval.
Kept active 100 percent tasks editable until someone confirms completion.

description: Added clickable user profile pages from user lists.
highlights: Added dedicated user detail pages with avatars, role badges, and task stats.
Added per-user completed-task charts with selectable time ranges.
Kept contact details permission-aware so admins and the owner can see them safely.

description: Added an admin-only analytics dashboard.
highlights: Added backend-enforced admin-only analytics access for admins and head admins.
Added analytics totals for users, tasks, completed tasks, and overdue tasks.
Added completed-tasks-over-time charts with selectable time windows.

description: Simplified profile settings and secured account deletion flow.
highlights: Removed password requirements for normal profile edits like username, contact, and profile picture changes.
Moved account deletion into a clearer confirmation flow with explicit password entry.
Kept root account deletion blocked in the backend.

description: Improved admin roles and root account protection.
highlights: Added head admin handling for root with secure backend enforcement.
Added root-only admin promotion and demotion controls.
Added admin and head admin badges across chat, activity, and admin user views.

description: Added language system and compact mode.
highlights: Added multi-language UI support with live switching and saved language preference.
Added compact mode to fit more tasks on screen instantly.
Improved reusable frontend translation hooks for future updates.

description: Added admin system and account management.
highlights: Added root admin privileges and admin-only route protection.
Added admin panel with user management tools.
Added account deletion flow with password confirmation and safe cleanup.

description: Added real-time updates.
highlights: Added Socket.IO powered live task and chat synchronization.
Added real-time activity feed updates.
Improved instant UI updates without full reloads.

description: Added chat system.
highlights: Added task chat per task card.
Added mentions, mention highlighting, and mention notifications.
Added username and timestamp display in chat messages.

description: Added user accounts.
highlights: Added login, registration, and forgot-password flow.
Added profile settings, profile pictures, and password changes.
Added contact-based verification support.

description: Added Konami system.
highlights: Added Konami code easter egg system with multiple effects.
Added confetti, cat gifs, shake, chaos, and popup effects.
Added fun personality reactions for task creation.

description: Added settings.
highlights: Added theme, reminders, sounds, and compact layout controls.
Added upcoming deadline threshold configuration.
Improved dashboard customization and settings UX.

description: Added progress bar improvements.
highlights: Added task progress bar rendering.
Added overdue and upcoming deadline sections.
Added completed-task lifecycle groundwork.

description: Added subtasks.
highlights: Added subtask creation and completion tracking.
Added subtask deadlines and priorities.
Added drag-and-drop subtask reordering.

description: Initial task system release.
highlights: Added the core task system.
Added task creation, editing, and deletion.
Added deadlines and priorities.
